title: begonia saxifraga
intro: Begonia saxifraga, also known as Begonia with rounded leaves, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and have been shown to have antibacterial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Begonia saxifraga are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves that can be applied topically or taken orally to promote overall health and well-being.
